ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the lighting product */,
  "voltage" TEXT /* Voltage specifications of the product */,
  "power" TEXT /* Power specifications of the product */,
  "lumens" TEXT /* Lumens specifications of the product */,
  "lamp_size" TEXT /* Physical dimensions of the lamp */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Unique model number for the product */,
  "color_temperature" TEXT /* Color temperature of the light */,
  "lifetime_hours" INTEGER /* Expected lifetime of the product in hours */,
  "is_dimmable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product is dimmable */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date and time of the last stock check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouse ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price at which the product was sold */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount percentage applied to the sale */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* History of purchases made by the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer first made a purchase */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product update */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the product update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "is_major_update" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the update is a major update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_updates_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager responsible for the warehouse */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse in terms of units */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy of the warehouse in terms of units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review was from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
